docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED DEC-28-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF(S) NOOR ATARI AND AREJJ BAZZARI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN VOTRUBA IS PRESENT. WITNESS TERESA VOTRUBA, TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ATARI, NOOR
DECLARATION OF NOOR ATARI RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATARI, NOOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2020 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JULY 7, 2021 AT 3:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 506.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-24-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-03-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATARI, NOOR BAZZARI, AREEJ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, JOHN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,160.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT RETURN AN APPROPRIATE AMOUINT OF A SECURITY DEPOSIT. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S DEDUCTION OF 2000 BASED ON ORAL ESTIMATES FROM LICENSED CONTRACTOR FOR CEILING REPAIR OF $500 AND $1500 FOR A TOTAL OF $2000 WERE EXCESSIVE. COURT FINDS DEDUCTION OF A TOTAL OF $1000 REASOANBLE. COURT FINDS OTHER DEDUCTIONS FROM SECURITY DEPOSIT WERE REASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-14-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NOOR ATARI. DEFENDANT JOHN VOTRUBA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT BY 3:45 P.M. AND DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,530.00 FILED BY ATARI, NOOR BAZZARI, AREEJ AS TO DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATARI, NOOR
(SC-105) ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT VOTRUBA, JOHN

(SC-105) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE JUL-07-20; TIME: 03:30PM , DEPT. 506.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR (SC-105) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE JUL-07-20; TIME: 03:30PM , DEPT. 506. HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-30-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. W. TRUPEK (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
